ExtraProperties.Name: FullName
ExtraProperties.Label: Full Name

ExtraProperties.Text:
I, the undersigned, understand and agree to the following provisions:

  1. The actual work performed may vary slightly from the original assessment after work commences, due to discovery of unforeseen circumstances, such as the following: a measure turns out to be unfeasible, safety issues arise, funding changes occur, or other pertinent factors evolve. Should this happen, the Contractor will explain why changes are necessary and what my options are, before work is continued.
  2. These services are free of charge to the owner (and tenant, if a rental). Installation of any of these measures requires removal from the premises and proper disposal of the old measures that are replaced (Exception:electrical power strip, retained by client/owner only upon request).
  3. If the dwelling is a rental, the tenants shall agree that any installed items owned by the Landlord and qualifying for installation, shall remain in the dwelling when they move out.

CertificationNote
ExtraProperties.Text:
CERTIFICATION OF EPA-CERTIFIED RENOVATOR: 
I certify under penalty of law that the information in this report is true and complete.

PRESUMPTION OF LEAD-BASED PAINT 
In the absence of paint testing or a certified lead-free dwelling unit, the presumption made by this contractor is that all painted surfaces on buildings, building components, or portions of buildings built prior to 1978 are presumed to contain lead-based paint.

ExtraProperties.Label: Moisture conditions within the home are severe and cannot be corrected within the program scope.
ExtraProperties.Name: MoistureConditionsWithinTheHome

ExtraProperties.Label: Evidence of significant infestation of rodents, insects, and/or other vermin is present.
ExtraProperties.Name: EvidenceOfSignificantInfestation

ExtraProperties.Label: Combustion appliance safety fail exists that cannot be reasonably corrected within program scope.
ExtraProperties.Name: CombustionApplianceSafetyFail

ExtraProperties.Label: Home receives HUD funding and when completed, will not meet HUD Lead‐Based Paint standards.
ExtraProperties.Name: HomeReceivesHudFunding

ExtraProperties.Label: Mechanical, electrical, or plumbing system is in such disrepair that failure is imminent.
ExtraProperties.Name: MechanicalElectricalOrPlumbing

ExtraProperties.Label: Maintenance or housekeeping practices limit access of workers to the dwelling for diagnostics or services.
ExtraProperties.Name: MaintenanceOrHousekeeping

ExtraProperties.Label: Home has unsafe air quality.
ExtraProperties.Name: HomeHasUnsafeAirQuality
ExtraProperties.HelpText: Ex: Sewage, significant animal feces in the home, improperly stored chemicals, combustible materials, un‐vented space heater, or other fire hazards present a danger to the occupants or workers, etc.

ExtraProperties.Label: Home is condemned, is under remodeling or rehabilitation, or has structural issues beyond the program scope.
ExtraProperties.Name: HomeIsCondemned

ExtraProperties.Label: An environmental condition exists that endanger the client or weatherization workers if work is performed.
ExtraProperties.Name: AnEnvironmentalConditionExists
ExtraProperties.HelpText: Ex: standing water/sewage, mold, friable asbestos, lead paint that would create a hazard if disturbed, etc.

ExtraProperties.Text:
CLIENT ACKNOWLEDGMENT:

I, the undersigned, have read (or had explained) the contents of this form and understand that:

  1. the conditions listed above prevent installation of some or all weatherization measures at this time;
  2. program limitations prevent the Weatherization Agency from correcting the problem(s); and
  3. after the condition/s listed above is/are corrected, dwelling will be re‐evaluated for measures previously deferred.
ExtraProperties.Name: DeferralClientAcknowledgement
DeferralAcknowledgementNotice
ExtraProperties.Text:
(D) Acknowledgment: 

This notice will be sent to the property owner by certified mail. The signature on the certified delivery receipt verifies receipt of this notice. You may acknowledge receipt of this notice and an understanding of the options outlined by signing below.

ExtraProperties.Name: ResponsibilitiesofthePropertyOwnerLabel
ExtraProperties.Text: (C) Responsibilities of the Property Owner

ExtraProperties.Name: ThePropertyOwnerMayChooseToSeekAssistance

ExtraProperties.Text:
(A) Deferral Conditions

Recently your home was inspected for weatherization services. It is the policy of this agency to provide weatherization services when those services may be delivered effectively and safely, without undue hazard to our staff or our clients. During our assessment, conditions were noted that prevent the weatherization of your home at this time. Those conditions are checked below.
ExtraProperties.Name: DeferralConditionsNote
